title: rubus calycinus var. pectinellus
intro: Rubus calycinus var. pectinellus, also known as Japanese wineberry or Pectinellus bramble, is a type of bramble that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus calycinus var. pectinellus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to act as an anti-aging agent. Rubus calycinus var. pectinellus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
